programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep703: Exploring sea caves stunning river valleys
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting explores the spectacular Canadian sea caves of les Îles de la Madeleine by sea kayak, and then paddles through one of North America’s most stunning river valleys in Jacques Cartier National Park.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep102: Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports including Jet Sprinting, Aquabike Racing and F1 H2O Powerboats. This episode features Round 2 of the Australian V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships from Temora in New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: Coral Reefs: Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: Xplash Ep104
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. Today we'll take an airboat ride in Florida to check out alligators, wakeboard through Bangkok's floating marketplace, and begin with a stormy yacht ride in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep703: Exploring sea caves stunning river valleys
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting explores the spectacular Canadian sea caves of les Îles de la Madeleine by sea kayak, and then paddles through one of North America’s most stunning river valleys in Jacques Cartier National Park.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 4 - Arville
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup is back with leg 4 in Belgium! Teams reunite in Arville to compete in eventing and become the best nation in the equestrian sport. Last time, France moved to the top in Le Pin au Haras, and competition is proving to be complicated. Are you ready for the challenge?Watch the best moments of the fourth leg in Arville.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup - Abu Dhabi

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. We will clean our equipment properly before feeding the horses and then we will be receiving Doctor Menegon, the voice for the Italian and International horse-riding competitions and introducing our special guest Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.desc: Immerse yourself in Iceland's beauty through stunning aerial footage. Enjoy majestic glaciers, geysers, and serene villages with calming music in the background. Perfect for relaxation!

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's Vantage N430 model is a sports car that makes drivers and enthusiasts feel the heritage of British race cars. Also: a combination of elegance and power, the Bentley Continental GTC Speed with its W12 Twin Turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a racing driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical is the right choice, as the company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is a powerful and agile racer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.desc: The second leg of the race goes from New York City to New Port City, Rhode Island. There are two major challenges on this leg: one is getting out of New York Harbour, dealing with the tides and the thicker winds that come off the city, and the other is dealing with the commercial traffic, as it is one of the busiest ports in the world. How will the skippers manage?

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Antisocial Behaviour
programme.desc: Jakob Kelser is a man with a horrific, troubled past. Having been failed by society and plagued by a gruesome childhood memory, he is forced to live alone in the unholy hell of God's making.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: The Faith Community
programme.desc: A group of religious students drive into the remote wilderness to spend time with a religious sect and strengthen their bond with God. The three unsuspecting students film everything to document their experience but soon find themselves in the dark.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E08 - Naturally Raw
programme.desc: This episode begins in Costa Rica, in an amazing rain forest. Here they make delicious chocolate out of cocoa beans. Mother Nature is at her magnificent best – showcasing hundreds of plant and animal species. And then to Kenya where green monkeys will be our tour-guides in the Lost City of Gedi plus a closer look at the wildlife which lives in very close proximity to the bustling streets of Nairobi.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E09 - Naturally Invigorating
programme.desc: Iceland: home to volcanic lakes and hot springs and mono-chromatic vistas. And then to Laos in South East Asia with its lush jungles, underground caves and water buffalo along the Mekong River.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E09 - Lost Peg Leg Treasure
programme.desc: Tom and Kia are out metal detecting in the desert looking for the lost Peg Leg Treasure.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E10 - Daylight and Gold
programme.desc: It's summer time in Alaska so Tom and Kia are making the most of the 24 hours of daylight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E02 - Meateaters
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea Pt2. Jim brings meat to the local village while Corey explores leech infested swamps looking for the local deer. Local villagers tell Jim of a remote area 400 miles away where buffalo roam.

programme.title: Beat Beat Heart
programme.desc: A playful romanticist has been waiting for the love of her life to return – when suddenly her newly separated mother moves in.

programme.title: Black Panther – The Story of Emilie and Jacob
programme.desc: Siblings Emilie and Jacob cannot help feeling a deep love for each other. After being apart for many years, they meet in the mountains.

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark

After a week, Victoria insists on marrying Sergio even though Adelaida and Clementina refuse; although Victoria does not love Sergio, she needs her mother's support to be happy; Adelaida does not want her daughter to make a mistake. Once at the civil headquarters, Carmencita tries to convince Victoria to cancel her marriage, while Hilario believes that Sergio is forcing Victoria to get married; at that moment, Nicolás shows up to tell Victoria that Sergio has sordid business with Fernanda, but Victoria does not believe Del Casal.Before Fernanda, Sergio claims to have his confession about Genara's death, so Fernanda points her gun at the man; the couple argues and the gun goes off; Florencia watches as Sergio - mortally wounded - leaves the office.

programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel pretende que Camila le entregue el cuaderno para conocer bien los detalles de la venganza. Luego, la sorprende al pedirle que se case con él a cambio de ayudarla pues si no hay boda, no hay trato ni sociedad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila y Max se ofenden con ironías y frases hirientes. Las cuatro mujeres involucradas en la traición vuelven a reunirse para aliarse y anular a Camila, pero la Madre Isabel se impone. Tanto el Padre Tiziano como Luciano advierten sobre el peligro del matrimonio entre Camila y Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel acepta que Camila no se va a casar con el por amor y hacen pactos. En Mascarada, Ezequiel anuncia el compromiso ante sus hijos y todo el personal; hay diversas reacciones.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
